stages.name: Inspect project
stages.purpose: Verify the project, evaluator, authority, and selected execution path.
stages.codex_action: Repair the smallest missing or inconsistent project input.

stages.name: Reconstruct visual context
stages.purpose: Produce or verify relative-scale visual context without granting metric authority.
stages.codex_action: Run or repair the hash-bound reconstruction adapter.

stages.name: Author twin candidate
stages.purpose: Create a versioned scene candidate with uncertainty and provenance.
stages.codex_action: Author or repair the repo-native twin candidate.

stages.name: Validate baseline twin
stages.purpose: Compile, step, and validate the baseline scene candidate.

stages.name: Normalize demonstrations
stages.purpose: Inventory and normalize demonstrations without silently repairing source evidence.
stages.codex_action: Resolve explicit source conflicts or missing observables.

stages.name: Freeze replay-ready splits
stages.purpose: Prove exact replay readiness and freeze disjoint episode roles before fitting.
stages.codex_action: Repair transforms, timing, state observables, or cohort sufficiency.

stages.name: Fit calibrated twin
stages.purpose: Fit bounded identifiable parameters using calibration episodes only.
stages.codex_action: Propose a bounded identifiable calibration experiment.

stages.name: Compare twin fidelity
stages.purpose: Compare baseline and calibrated twins on frozen validation and policy probes.
stages.codex_action: Inspect held-out fidelity, sensitivity, and failure-agreement evidence.

stages.name: Compile cousin curriculum
stages.purpose: Compile the smallest bounded pose/layout cousin batch from declared envelopes.
stages.codex_action: Propose bounded cousins for the largest coverage gaps.

stages.name: Admit dataset
stages.purpose: Replay, separately evaluate, and adapt accepted candidates into an immutable dataset.
stages.codex_action: Repair rejected candidates without changing held-outs.

stages.name: Train policy candidates
stages.purpose: Train immutable candidates from one admitted dataset without promotion authority.
stages.codex_action: Run the bounded local or paid-compute training recipe.

stages.name: Evaluate policy candidates
stages.purpose: Run the frozen independent evaluator and compare candidate consequences.
stages.codex_action: Inspect evaluator-owned candidate verdicts and failure cases.

stages.name: Route counterexamples
stages.purpose: Deduplicate failures and route guarded repairs without automatic training admission.
stages.codex_action: Diagnose mechanisms and propose separately evaluated corrections.

stages.name: Publish evidence and promotion state
stages.purpose: Join immutable identities and publish an evaluator-owned final state.
stages.codex_action: Publish the evidence map and downstream skill package only when eligible.
